title: Cytokines: Immune Text Messages
script_summary: Cytokines are chemical signals that help immune cells coordinate, but too many can cause chaos.

segments.voiceover: What if your body sent messages that could start a storm?
Cytokines are like text messages for immune cells, guiding responses to infections.
But what happens when those messages go haywire?
In a cytokine storm, excessive signals can overwhelm the body, leading to severe inflammation.
This dysregulation may contribute to conditions like COVID-19, but research is ongoing.
Want to understand your immunity better? Follow for more science insights!
